grammar: journey/TOUR — KEYFRAME CHAIN: 5 approved stills (K0–K4) bracket 4 clips; every clip generated with start_image=K(i-1) AND end_image=K(i), so seams are frame-locked by construction
videoBackend: seedance-2.0 via Higgsfield MCP (std, 1080p, 16:9, no audio, 8-10s)

shots.name: THE TERRACE
shots.chain: K3 → K4 (loop variant may echo K0)

frameSpec.budgetDecision: inherited from lab/003 finding: 36s @ spec's old 20fps default ≈ 40MB → busts budget. Desktop 10fps/1440/q55 = 360 frames ≈ 13-15MB (eager half ~7MB); mobile J1+J4 10fps/720 ≈ 190 frames ≈ 3.5MB. Placeholders: 200/100.

scaffold: JOURNEY 4-segment scrub: APPROACH hero statement → ARRIVAL → FLOW (pinned space cards) → TERRACE — floor-counter HUD (FLOOR 0→60 + space names) throughout
RESIDENCE FACTS strip (4 bed · 5.5 bath · 7,200 sq ft · floor 60 — count-up)
CTA (Request a Private Showing: date + name + email · agent card Alexandra Cole)

copySlots.note: all copy lives in site/src/content/skin.ts (TEMPLATE LAW). Per-pitch prospect reskins swap name/copy/facts there; clips are never regenerated.

uniqueness.note: 004 is the flagship SKIN of the 003 template — uniqueness law deliberately NOT applied between skins of the same template (that is the template's purpose). Skin-level differences: ink+champagne palette, EN copy, floor-counter HUD (vs altitude), amenities/price/agent modules (vs kitchen/seasons/hosts).
uniqueness.texture: soft grain + slow drifting light shaft (template default)
